name: soc2 evidence collection: validator accepts mixed artifact extensions (png, pdf, txt, json, md) within a control subdir
command: mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC1.1 && touch compliance/evidence/CC1.1/access-review.png compliance/evidence/CC1.1/policy.pdf compliance/evidence/CC1.1/notes.txt compliance/evidence/CC1.1/report.json compliance/evidence/CC1.1/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-evidence-folder.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --check-non-empty && echo ok 1>&2
